titleStmt.title: SII 10.221: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 221. (A.R. No. 392 of 1915.) ON A STONE BUILT INTO THE PLATFORM OF THE TAMBRALA MAṆḌAPA IN THE TEMPLE OF MŪLASTHĀNĒŚVARA, NĀDEṆḌLA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT. Date missing.

summary.p: Incomplete. Refers to the grant (of land) made by one Kommiseṭṭi to the temple of Sōmēśvara and of 55 sheep by a certain Koṇḍiseṭṭi for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Chōḍēśvara of Nādiṇḍla. Also refers to a convention entered into by the Teliki one thousand of Bejavāḍa to the effect that the jewels of a deceased wife go to the husband and not to the other relations of the deceased woman. Beginning Lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
navāru mahāpātakamu sēsinavā
ru kommiseṭṭi tamatallitaṁḍriki dharmmārtthamu
gā nāṁdiṁḍlavāyābyamuna dikkuna ceṟu
vupaścima śrī sōmēśvaramahādēvaraku
nivēdyamunaku nicce dīni nevvarēniṁ jeṟi
cinavāru mahāpātakamu sēsinavāru
śrī bejavāḍa sāsanulaina teliki
vēvuru sēsina samayamu yālucaccina
yālikiṁ galaṭṭipāṭitoḍavu maganivi
kāni yālivāru penaṁgirēni mahāpāta
kamu sēsinavāru koṁḍiseṭṭi tamatallida
ṁḍri pōtiseṭṭiki dharmmārttha nādiḍacōḍē
svaraśrīmahādēvaraku yakaṁḍavarttidī
paṁbuva kiccinagoṟiyalu 55 vīniṁjē
nityamāneṁḍu nēyivō
yaṁgalavāṁḍu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa
Digital edition of SII 10.221 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
